description:
Volkswagen Golf 2.0 TSI BlueMotion Tech R DSG 4Motion Euro 6 (s/s) 5dr
£— | 95,000 miles | Petrol | Automatic | 4Motion

*RECENTLY HAD WATER PUMP REPLACED & SERVICE DONE*

The car benefits from a full service history, 2 keys, and has clearly been well maintained. A very high-spec example with desirable factory options.
Key Features:
2.0 TSI 300bhp
DSG Automatic Gearbox
4Motion All-Wheel Drive
Euro 6 (ULEZ compliant)
Full Service History
2 Keys
High Specification Includes:
- Carbon / Nappa two-tone leather interior (black & cream)
- Discover Navigation Pro touchscreen system (sat nav, DVD, radio)
- 19” Pretoria alloy wheels
-  Blue metallic paint
- Voice activation for audio
- Heated front seats
- Maxton kit
- Induction kit
- Custom exhaust
Smooth engine, responsive gearbox, and tight handling — exactly how a Golf R should drive. Ideal performance hatch with strong reliability and practicality.
Viewings and test drives welcome.
Part exchange considered. Finance available.

Why Buy From Driven3 Automotive?
🚗 Minimum 3 Months Warranty Included (extendable for added peace of mind) 🛠 Minimum 6 Months MOT on all vehicles 🔍 All Cars HPI Checked 🤝 AA Partnered Dealer 💳 All Major Debit & Credit Cards Accepted 💷 Finance Available – we work with a range of finance companies to secure the best possible deal 🔁 Part Exchange Welcome 🚚 Nationwide Delivery Available

📍 Viewings welcome by appointment 📞 Message or call for more details
